headlines.title: Biden sues DOJ to stop release of audio from interviews with ghostwriter of his memoir
headlines.description: The former president is urging a judge to block the release of recordings and transcripts of his private conversations with the ghostwriter of his 2017 memoir.

headlines.title: Ken Paxton defeats GOP Sen. John Cornyn in Texas primary runoff
headlines.description: Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton has defeated Sen.

headlines.title: Democrat Johnny Garcia wins Texas House primary after rival’s antisemitic comments
headlines.description: Democrat Johnny Garcia has won his party’s primary in Texas’ 35th Congressional District, NBC News projects, defeating a rival whom party leaders had condemned for antisemitic comments as Democrats look to compete in a district Republicans redrew to their benefit

headlines.title: US and Iran Trade Multiple Strikes Amid Fragile Ceasefire
headlines.description: Iran released new footage of what it claims are its air defenses firing at American drones and a fighter jet in an incident that nearly broke the fragile ceasefire with the United States. The Trump administration says a framework peace deal could be reached this week and a U.S. official tells NBC News the agreement would see the ceasefire extended 60 days, open the Strait of Hormuz and initiate talks on Iran’s nuclear programs. NBC’s Richard Engel reports for TODAY.

headlines.title: Paxton thanks Trump after Texas Senate primary win
headlines.description: Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton thanked his supporters and President Trump calling his endorsement “the most powerful force in politics.” Paxton defeated Sen. John Cornyn in the Republican Senate primary runoff.

headlines.title: Cornyn concedes after projected loss in Texas Senate primary
headlines.description: Sen. John Cornyn spoke to supporters saying “we’ve come up short” after his projected defeat by Trump-backed candidate Ken Paxton in the Republican Senate primary in Texas.

headlines.title: Extended Interview: Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio
headlines.description: On the sidelines of the Trump-Xi Summit in Beijing, NBC News' Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio to discuss China policy, the war with Iran, the future of Cuba, and more.

headlines.title: Map: How much you pay in federal and state gas taxes
headlines.description: As national gas price averages head toward $5 per gallon, one state has already suspended its gas tax, and now President Donald Trump and his Cabinet are talking about doing the same.

headlines.title: Rep. Julie Johnson unseated in Texas Democratic primary by predecessor Colin Allred
headlines.description: Former Rep. Colin Allred has unseated Rep. Julie Johnson.

headlines.title: Zohran Mamdani wades into housing debate with a plan that could define his time in office
headlines.description: New York Mayor Zohran Mamdani unveiled proposals to build 200,000 affordable housing units and preserve an additional 200,000 more over the next decade as part of a comprehensive housing plan that amounts to a substantial marker in the national debate on those issues.

headlines.title: John Cornyn undone by past Trump misgivings after decades as a loyal party man
headlines.description: John Cornyn was a loyal Republican soldier. There’s no disputing that Cornyn’s voting record was almost perfectly aligned with Trump. Ken Paxton’s lopsided victory captured an important reality of the GOP in 2026, too: That’s not enough.

headlines.title: Democratic Rep. Al Green unseated in primary with two incumbents
headlines.description: Freshman Rep. Christian Menefee defeated longtime Rep. Al Green in the Democratic primary runoff for Texas’ 18th Congressional District, NBC News projects, after a rare incumbent-on-incumbent matchup sparked by Republican-led redistricting efforts.
